title: IT Capacity Planning: System Stats Story Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating how to translate raw system performance metrics (CPU, Memory, Disk, Network) into actionable insights and business-level stories for capacity planning.
relationships: Metrics are compared against Thresholds to identify anomalies
Anomalies are analyzed for Trends and Correlations to find root cause
The root cause is translated into a Business Impact story (e.g., 'If CPU trend continues, checkout service will slow by 20% during next sale')
The story leads to a specific Capacity Planning Recommendation (e.g., 'Add 2 VCPUs before Q4 promotion')
